---
title: "Mr Layland"
---

## Mr Layland

### Description

mentioned in connection with Eastleigh church, 1870

### Biography

Possibly CMY may have misspelt the name of the Rev. [[person:890]W. A. Longlands]?

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
